fit.yoe: JD asks '3 years of experience in a learning and development role' — Jamie has ~3 yrs. BEST YOE match of the batch (clean, not a stretch on YOE).
fit.match: Strong L&D-ops fit: design/deliver/evaluate training, needs assessments with HRBPs/SMEs, LMS administration, measurement. Maps to InGenius (needs assessments + 3 programs + 600+ webinars), NextGen (2,000+ EX analysis), ODN (HR data analytics).
fit.honest_gaps_disclosed: SCORM e-learning authoring (Captivate/Articulate/Lectora) = 'strongly preferred', Jamie is newer to it (disclosed truthfully in cover + in Step-4 e-learning-tools answer, framed as ramp-up area, NOT claimed). 'Supervising direct reports' = 'preferred', Jamie has none (not claimed).
